transcript: Speaker A: Uh, um, one pasta, macron, macaroni, uh, spicy no, uh... Speaker B: Sir???? Speaker A: Kash consistency banai hoti Speakx. [Wish I had maintained consistency with Speakx.] Speakx ke real life modules continue kiye hote Speakx. [Wish I had continued Speakx's real-life modules.] Speakx ka AI tutor apne real life conversation se everyday English sikha deta. [Speakx's AI tutor would have taught everyday English through real-life conversations.] Aur ye wah! Isme toh restaurant, travel, shopping, interview preparation, sabke ready-made scenario-based dialogues hai. [And wow! This has ready-made scenario-based dialogues for restaurant, travel, shopping, and interview preparation.] AI tutor tone aur fluency score deta hai, and pauses bhi analyze karta hai. [The AI tutor gives tone and fluency scores, and also analyzes pauses.] Aur ye vocabulary hints aur adaptive grammar se toh bolna smooth aur practice easy ho jayegi. [And with these vocabulary hints and adaptive grammar, speaking will become smooth and practice will be easy.] Don't let your English ruin your confidence. Practice makes man confident. Start your English practice with Speakx AI Tutor.

summary: A young man experiences embarrassment at a restaurant when he struggles to order food in English. He regrets not practicing consistently with the Speakx app, which features AI-driven real-life conversation scenarios, fluency scoring, and vocabulary hints. The ad concludes with a call to action to start practicing English with Speakx to build confidence.
